notes:
Some places in the game are extremely laggy, mainly the cat chase near the beginning and the water levels. For a fast-paced game like this, some parts are unplayable. Nevertheless, it did run.

It kept a solid framerate on windows
title: Changed

notes:
Needs the "corefonts" package installed.
This can be done by installing winetricks and protontricks, then execute

"protontricks 814540 corefonts"

in a terminal after you've launched the game once to find out that the fonts are missing. You'll need some patience for it to download and install, but it shouldn't take longer than 2 minutes to complete.
Take this uwu while you're at it.
title: Changed
